---
title: Inline Parameter Tests
format: html
---

Each section tests a single inline shortcode parameter in isolation. No YAML calendar configuration is used.

## `file` (TSV)

Tests loading events from a TSV file.

{{< toastui file="data/events.tsv" file-sep="\t" >}}

## `file` (CSV)

Tests loading events from a CSV file.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," >}}

## `file-sep` (tab)

Tests explicit tab separator.

{{< toastui file="data/events.tsv" file-sep="\t" >}}

## `file-sep` (comma)

Tests explicit comma separator.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," >}}

## `defaultView` (month)

Tests month view.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="month" >}}

## `defaultView` (week)

Tests week view.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="week" >}}

## `defaultView` (day)

Tests day view.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="day" >}}

## `height` (pixels string)

Tests height as a CSS pixel string.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," height="400px" >}}

## `height` (numeric coercion)

Tests numeric height coerced to pixels.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," height="350" >}}

## `height` (vh units)

Tests height as a viewport-height CSS value.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," height="50vh" >}}

## `timegridHeight`

Tests custom timegrid height in week view.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="week" timegridHeight="300%" >}}

## `navigation` (true)

Tests navigation bar is visible (default).

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," navigation="true" >}}

## `navigation` (false)

Tests navigation bar is hidden.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," navigation="false" >}}

## `date`

Tests setting the initial calendar date.

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," date="2026-04-17" >}}
